title: angelica saxicola var. saxicola
intro: Angelica saxicola var. saxicola, also known as Mountain Angelica, is a variety of the Angelica plant, a perennial herb native to the mountains of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Angelica saxicola var. saxicola include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and support liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for a range of ailments. Herbal preparations of Angelica saxicola var. saxicola include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed on their own or combined with other herbs to create a more potent remedy.
